data.name: 米拉與奇妙的煉金術
data.detailed_description:
In a world where magic and alchemy are commonplace, lives an apprentice alchemist named Mira.

One day when practicing at the alchemy university, Mira makes a huge mistake while trying to create a potion.

As the smoke clears, everything seems to be fine, but she begins to feel strange. Before long, she realizes that her body has changed!

Now she must go in search of the ingredients to craft the antidote!

Features:

  • Classic RPG Experience

  • Explore Various Dungeons

  • Action RPG Combat

  • Collect Ingredients

  • Craft Items Using Alchemy
data.about_the_game:
In a world where magic and alchemy are commonplace, lives an apprentice alchemist named Mira.

One day when practicing at the alchemy university, Mira makes a huge mistake while trying to create a potion.

As the smoke clears, everything seems to be fine, but she begins to feel strange. Before long, she realizes that her body has changed!

Now she must go in search of the ingredients to craft the antidote!

Features:

  • Classic RPG Experience

  • Explore Various Dungeons

  • Action RPG Combat

  • Collect Ingredients

  • Craft Items Using Alchemy
data.short_description: After making a big mistake while trying to craft a potion at the alchemy university, the apprentice alchemist Mira finds that she has exposed herself to an elixir that made fundamental changes to her body. Now she must go in search of the ingredients in order to craft the antidote.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
